response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and web engineer whose career centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not C++. His only professional C++ work is a ~6-month stint at National Instruments writing components for a C IDE, with no indication of Windows-platform focus. He has no exposure to capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking systems, and while RIDE Capital is finance-adjacent, it involved general Node.js/TypeScript backend work. SQL appears in his skills list but there is no evidence of deep SQL Server or Oracle proficiency. The two mandatory pillars of the role — substantial Windows C++ development and financial-domain expertise — are both absent.
strengths: Broad polyglot background with CI/CD exposure and Java experience, covering several optional/desirable skills
Demonstrated communication skills through conference talks, workshops, and community organizing
Long career with consistent senior-level responsibility across multiple production systems
concerns: C++ experience is limited to roughly 6 months at National Instruments with no Windows-platform emphasis and no recent usage
Zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domains
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle proficiency; SQL usage appears surface-level and MySQL/MongoDB-oriented
